message: Node started: Given a candidate k from the weight_analyzer, verify if it is possible to sum k distinct powers of 2 to get a multiple of 2023. Specifically, check if there is a subset of the cyclic group generated by 2 modulo 2023 that sums to 0 modulo 2023 using exactly k elements. If k is small, this can be done by checking combinations of residues of 2^j mod 2023.
